answer:
<think> I know that "60 Minutes" is a long-running American news program that has featured many notable journalists over the years. I also recall that in 2003, the US-led invasion of Iraq was a major news event, and it's likely that a prominent anchor would have been sent to cover the story. I'm trying to think of a well-known anchor who was associated with CBS at that time... I'm not sure if it was Dan Rather or Mike Wallace, but I think I've heard of a female anchor who was also a prominent figure on the show... Ah, I've got it! I'm going to take a guess that it was Lesley Stahl who interviewed Saddam Hussein on February 24, 2003.</think>
<answer> Lesley Stahl </answer>
